title: Immersive Interfaces - Traveler's Backpack
description: This texture pack adds support for Traveler's Backpack, matching its design with the look and feel of Immersive Interfaces.
body: **Bundle Texture Pack Compat** [**Immersive Interfaces - Mod Support Unofficial**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/immersive-interfaces-mod-support-unofficial) ### Immersive Interfaces - Mod Support Unofficial This texture pack adds special compatibility with Traveler's Backpack, integrating its grooves into the aesthetics of Immersive Interfaces. ### Before: ![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5772e6ef5345fbc8fc0e651ef7553a7474416aec.png) ### After: ![b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53192abe2b42f6d7ddd4cb006126b2aa672c960a.png)
